seek_registry.name: K3nLLVComplementHighestWeightVectorAlgebraicity
seek_registry.needed_statement: Every required K3^[n]-type LLV-complement highest-weight Hodge class in the target range is algebraic, with a constructive or source-bound cycle realization independent of HodgeConjecture_general.
required_payload: binding to K3^[n] terminal defect witness

seek_registry.name: ExplicitNonCircularK3nDefectWitnessTheorem
seek_registry.needed_statement: There exists an explicit K3^[n]-type Hodge class outside the certified SH/row-0 tautological transport span, together with an algebraic-cycle realization and a noncircularity proof.

seek_registry.name: K3nDefectWitnessDeformationTransportTheorem
seek_registry.needed_statement: An externally proven deformation/monodromy transport theorem carries the explicit non-tautological algebraic witness across the required marked K3^[n]-type domain without collapsing it into the certified tautological span.

seek_registry.name: LowNCompleteK3nHodgeClassClassificationSource
seek_registry.needed_statement: A complete low-n classification of required K3^[n]-type Hodge classes identifying which are tautological and which require non-tautological witnesses.

forbidden_substitutes: using a tautological row-0 class as a noncircular defect witness
using a source anchor without exact theorem statement
using a conditional theorem as unconditional closure
boundary: does not supply external theorem input
does not assert Clay problem closure
